hero.title:
Applied engineering that
transforms processes.
hero.description: Head of Mechanical Maintenance Packaging Sector at Bagley Argentina · Arcor Group. 16 people, high-speed machinery, automation and development. Always oriented towards applied engineering to solve problems.

projects.title:
What I built
with genuine passion for industry and engineering.

about.title:
Technician, manager
and builder of solutions.
about.description1: I work at the intersection of precision mechanics, automation and software development. I lead the maintenance of high-speed packaging lines while designing 3D parts, writing algorithms to be implemented in microcontrollers and learning Next.js in my free time.
about.description2: My goal: bring that comprehensive vision to the development team of new methods and technologies at Bagley, where each improvement impacts millions of packages that reach the shelves of Argentina.

skills.maintenanceDetail: Complete cycle in high-speed machinery and central workshop.
skills.projectsDetail: Leadership of 16+ people and end-of-line upgrade operations (GTP).
skills.automationDetail: Microcontroller algorithms and computer vision with OpenCV.
skills.prototypingDetail: Validation of functional improvements through FDM 3D printing.
skills.webDetail: Development of interfaces for technical data management and visualization.

cv.title: Curriculum Vitae
cv.subtitle: Chem. Eng. · Head of Maintenance Sector · Bagley Argentina

profile.description: Chemical Engineer specialized in Quality with comprehensive experience in high-speed industrial maintenance and process improvement in food plants. Currently in charge of the packaging mechanical sector and central workshop for machining and welding at Bagley Argentina (Arcor Group). I combine team management with agile methodologies, 3D prototyping and process automation. With the conviction of executing concrete improvements based on applied engineering to technical and management processes.

currentJob.title: Sector Head – Packaging Mechanical Maintenance & Central Workshop
currentJob.company: Bagley Argentina S.A. – Arcor Group · Cookie Plant, Córdoba
responsibilities: Leadership of 16 people: mechanics, turners and welders, with full maintenance cycle management (preventive, predictive and corrective).
Responsible for the central workshop specialized in machining and welding, ensuring availability of high-speed machinery.
Leadership of 3 complete end-of-line equipment upgrade operations, from technical specification to commissioning and startup (GTP).
Participation in the Plant Improvement Pillar with direct involvement in focused improvement groups (GME).
Implementation of agile methodologies with 3D printers and rapid prototyping applied to maintenance.
Multidisciplinary management of electronic maintenance and development of microcontroller algorithms for packaging line automation.

previousJob1.title: Production Sector Head / Process Engineer
responsibilities: Operational management of 5 high-speed production lines with a team of more than 100 collaborators.
Leadership in Early Project Management (GTP) for the assembly of new lines and optimization of thermal processes.
Implementation of Quality and Food Safety standards under the Integrated Management System (IMS).
Waste analysis and OEE optimization through standardization of manufacturing processes.

previousJob2.title: Senior Field Engineer
responsibilities: Technical support and sales of specialized services for oil and gas wells (Vaca Muerta and conventional basins).
Technical feasibility studies for the application of new technologies under critical operating conditions.
Management of internal audits under ISO standards and IMS quality processes.
Coordination of logistics and field resources for high technical complexity operations.

items.title: Chemical Engineer
items.extra: GPA: 8.97 | Distinguished Graduate UNC | Laboratory Instructor

proyectos.title:
Every development has
a story.
proyectos.description: Industrial projects, automation, prototypes and developments carried out.

simulacion-estadistica-pesaje.title: Statistical Simulation: Multi-head Weighing
simulacion-estadistica-pesaje.subtitle: Weight Distribution Optimization in R
simulacion-estadistica-pesaje.description: Development of a stochastic model in R language to simulate the behavior of multi-head scales. The algorithm allowed predicting optimal load combinations and reducing final weight variability, minimizing product giveaway and ensuring compliance with net weight regulations.

prototipado-agile-3d.title: Rapid Prototyping and Agile Methodologies
prototipado-agile-3d.subtitle: Additive Manufacturing applied to Focused Improvement
prototipado-agile-3d.description: Implementation of a 3D printing ecosystem (FDM) for the creation of critical spare parts, lead time reduction, and validation of functional improvements. Integration with Focused Improvement Groups (GME) and autonomous maintenance.

vision-artificial-calidad.title: Computer Vision for Quality Control
vision-artificial-calidad.subtitle: Automation with Python and OpenCV
vision-artificial-calidad.description: Development of a prototype computer vision system for detecting anomalies in products on the production line. Implementation of real-time segmentation and classification algorithms, with integration capability into SCADA systems.

montaje-infraestructura-industrial.title: Productive Infrastructure Assembly
montaje-infraestructura-industrial.subtitle: Assembly Management and Asset Coordination
montaje-infraestructura-industrial.description: Technical leadership in the assembly and installation of 3 complete end-of-line systems and more than 30 peripheral equipment. Comprehensive coordination of multidisciplinary teams, including plant personnel and external contractors, ensuring compliance with critical construction schedules, safety regulations, and process engineering standards.

simulacion-cfd-mezclado.title: CFD Simulation for Industrial Mixing
simulacion-cfd-mezclado.subtitle: Equipment Capacity Analysis for New Technology
simulacion-cfd-mezclado.description: A Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulation is performed to determine if the capacity of mixing equipment is sufficient to implement a new technology in Argentina. The study evaluates flow patterns, mixing times, and dead zones, allowing technical feasibility validation before equipment investment.

optimizador-vacaciones-restricciones.title: Vacation Optimization System
optimizador-vacaciones-restricciones.subtitle: Permutation Algorithm with Critical Constraints
optimizador-vacaciones-restricciones.description: Development of a logical tool for automated annual leave assignment. The system uses optimized permutation algorithms to evaluate millions of possible combinations, ensuring compliance with the Labor Contract Law (LCT) and guaranteeing that operational levels and minimum technical headcount are never compromised.

cnc-etching-scanner-printer.title: Plate Etching CNC with Recycled Hardware
cnc-etching-scanner-printer.subtitle: Repurposing AGFA Scanner and Olivetti JP192 Printer
cnc-etching-scanner-printer.description: CNC machine for etching built entirely from recycled components: an old AGFA scanner and an Olivetti JP192 printer. The system takes advantage of the linear motion mechanisms of the scanner and printer to achieve a functional coordinate axis. The resolution achieved is approximately 0.2 mm, allowing precision engraving on different materials. An open-source electronics, mechanics, and firmware project.

bluetooth-balanza-precision-pic.title: Bluetooth Interface for Precision Balance
bluetooth-balanza-precision-pic.subtitle: Bidirectional Adapter with PIC 12F629 and HC-06
bluetooth-balanza-precision-pic.description: Development of a wireless Bluetooth interface for a laboratory precision balance (milligram resolution). The system was implemented with an HC-06 module and a PIC 12F629 microcontroller, making the most of its scarce resources. A real-time data converter was designed that transforms the native 7-bit format of the balance to 8 bits and vice versa, allowing full bidirectional transmission. The main challenge was managing conversion and communication buffer on a low-cost, limited-memory microcontroller, solved with bit-by-bit optimization and assembler routines.

calibre-digital-bluetooth-pic.title: Bluetooth Interface for Digital Caliper
calibre-digital-bluetooth-pic.subtitle: Wireless Adapter with PIC12F629 and HC-05/HC-06 Module
calibre-digital-bluetooth-pic.description: Development of a plug-in interface to transmit data from a Chinese digital caliper via Bluetooth to a PC or mobile device in real time. The project required reverse engineering the caliper's communication, porting the algorithm to a PIC12F629 microcontroller. It includes the design of a thin PCB and an innovative flexible circuit connector (flex) handcrafted from 0.05mm brass sheets, to attach to the caliper without invasive soldering. The firmware allows selecting between transmission modes (on value change, by button, by serial command, or continuous) and the type of data sent (mm, inches, raw data, or HEX).

vision-computada-seguimiento-hormigas.title: Computer Vision System for Ant Tracking
vision-computada-seguimiento-hormigas.subtitle: Evaluation of Attractant and Repellent Substances (CONICET)
vision-computada-seguimiento-hormigas.description: Development of a computer vision system for automated tracking of ants in laboratory tests, in collaboration with CONICET and associate researcher María Laura Peschiuta. The system was implemented in Python using the Computer Vision 2 (CV2) library, allowing detection and tracking of multiple individuals in real time. The objective is to quantitatively evaluate the attractant or repellent power of different chemical substances on ant behavior, generating trajectories, heat maps, and permanence metrics in areas of interest.

cnc-reciclado-impresoras-a3.title: CNC System with Recycled A3 Printers
cnc-reciclado-impresoras-a3.subtitle: Use of Flexible Connectors and Recovered Electronics
cnc-reciclado-impresoras-a3.description: Development of a CNC machine built from recycled A3 printers, reusing components such as flexible connectors (flat cables) and part of the original electronics. The system uses a technology stack composed of Marlin as control firmware, Inkscape for vector design, and Gcodetools for generating cutting and engraving paths. This approach reduces costs and promotes the circular economy in the field of prototyping and digital manufacturing.

camara-reflectancia-espectrometro-ocean-.title: Reflectance Camera with Ocean Optics 2000 Spectrometer
camara-reflectancia-espectrometro-ocean-.subtitle: Measurement System for Plant Ecophysiology (CONICET)
camara-reflectancia-espectrometro-ocean-.description: Development of a camera for reflectance measurement through the practical implementation of a spectral scan with a visible Ocean Optics 2000 spectrometer. A high-reflectance barium bicarbonate standard was designed and generated by precipitation, ensuring maximum reflectance values for system calibration. This device was used by CONICET and researcher María Laura Peschiuta in various investigations in the field of plant ecophysiology, allowing optical characterization of plant tissues and monitoring of physiological parameters.

diseno-interiores-relevamiento-3d.title: Interior Design: Survey, 3D Modeling and Optimization
diseno-interiores-relevamiento-3d.subtitle: Comprehensive Space and Material Planning
diseno-interiores-relevamiento-3d.description: Development of comprehensive interior design projects ranging from precise surveying of existing spaces to detailed 3D modeling, material budgeting, and resource optimization. Methodologies are implemented to maximize material efficiency, reduce waste, and tailor designs to the client's functional and aesthetic needs. The process includes scanning or manual measurement, parametric modeling, and lighting and texture simulation for informed decision making.

temporizador-viscoso-aeronautica.title: Ultra-Lightweight Viscous Timer
temporizador-viscoso-aeronautica.subtitle: 3D Modeling, Mechanical Design and Retarding Fluid Simulation
temporizador-viscoso-aeronautica.description: Complete development of an ultra-lightweight viscous timer intended for experimental activities in the aeronautical field. The project included 3D modeling of mechanical parts assemblies, design of the retarding fluid circuit, and Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) simulation. Internal geometry was optimized to achieve precise delay times under vibration and acceleration conditions typical of aerospace environments, using ultra-light materials without compromising mechanical robustness.

estudio-prefactibilidad-silicato-sodio.title: Pre-feasibility Study: Sodium Silicate Plant
estudio-prefactibilidad-silicato-sodio.subtitle: Joint Production of Sodium Silicate and Derivatives
estudio-prefactibilidad-silicato-sodio.description: Comprehensive pre-feasibility study for the installation of a sodium silicate and its main derivatives (precipitated silica, colloidal silica, and silica gel) manufacturing plant in Argentina. The project included national and international market studies, analysis of raw material availability, selection of production technologies with energy efficiency and environmental compatibility criteria, mass and energy balance, equipment sizing, plant layout with over 16,000 tons per year capacity, zero liquid emissions effluent treatment, organizational structure, analysis of investment and operating costs, and economic-financial evaluation (NPV, IRR, break-even point). The work was developed at the Chair of Organization and Industrial Project of the National University of Córdoba (UNC).

pasimetro-alta-precision-helices.title: High Precision Pitch Meter for Aerodynamic Characterization
pasimetro-alta-precision-helices.subtitle: 3D Design and Printing with Aluminum Structure
pasimetro-alta-precision-helices.description: Development and construction of a high-precision pitch meter (propeller pitch test bench) for aerodynamic characterization of scale propellers. The device combines 3D printed parts for complex components and an aluminum structural frame to ensure rigidity and dimensional stability. It allows accurate measurement of geometric and aerodynamic pitch of propellers of different diameters and configurations, facilitating validation of experimental designs for applications in aeromodelling, drones, and unmanned aerial vehicles. The system includes angle and linear displacement sensors, data acquisition interface, and processing software for pitch curves per radial station.
